title: Secure authentication
confidence_rationale: Source evidence directly supports password hashing and the missing rate-limit gap, but production identity governance evidence was not present.
evidence_quality_rationale: Concrete code anchors cover only technical authentication behavior and manual access governance records remain outstanding.
ticket_ready_action: Add per-IP and per-account login throttling, then attach MFA and lockout evidence.

title: Logging
confidence_rationale: Application logging code and the missing privileged-action audit call were reviewed, but production retention and monitoring records were not available.
evidence_quality_rationale: Source anchors support selected logging behavior, while operational log governance requires manual artifacts.
ticket_ready_action: Add structured audit logging for privileged user deletion and attach retention/SIEM evidence.
